description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The back is matte black with a prominent, centered Apple logo and a triple camera array housed in a raised square module at the top left. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with a thin black bezel and a notch at the top for sensors and the front-facing camera. The screen displays a typical iOS home screen with various app icons, a dock at the bottom, and a visible wallpaper. The sides are slim and appear to be made of metal, with subtle button placements visible. The overall design is minimalist and premium, characteristic of recent Apple iPhone models.
description: A sleek, matte black smartphone with a triple camera array on the back and a large, edge-to-edge display on the front showing an iOS home screen. The device features a minimalist design with a centered Apple logo and slim metallic sides.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a matte black finish, centered Apple logo, and a triple camera array in a raised square module at the top left.
description_view_1: Left side profile revealing the slimness of the device and the slight protrusion of the camera module.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large screen with app icons, a notch at the top, and thin bezels.
description_view_3: Right side profile highlighting the thin metallic edge and the camera bump.
attribute_brand_logo: Centered on the back, a black Apple logo is visible, matching the matte finish.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen shows an iOS home screen with a green and white wallpaper, a status bar at the top, and multiple app icons including Maps, Podcasts, Entertainment, Notes, ESPN, Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter.
attribute_camera_placement: Three camera lenses arranged in a triangular pattern within a raised square module at the top left corner of the back, accompanied by a flash.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are subtly visible on the left and right edges, likely including a volume rocker and power button, typical of iPhone design.
